sourceTypes.name: publicWebsite
sourceTypes.definition: Publicly accessible page or site studied from a URL.

sourceTypes.name: authenticatedProduct
sourceTypes.definition: Logged-in product or app surface studied with project permission.

sourceTypes.name: screenshotSet
sourceTypes.definition: Static screenshot collection used as study evidence.

sourceTypes.name: prototype
sourceTypes.definition: Prototype, mockup, or pre-production interface used as study evidence.

sourceTypes.name: documentedReference
sourceTypes.definition: Documented reference, design spec, or written source used as evidence.

sourceTypes.name: internalProduct
sourceTypes.definition: Internal product or owned surface studied inside a project workspace.
